overview.description: The First Trust Flexible Municipal High Income ETF (MFLX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in tax-exempt US municipal bonds of any maturity and credit quality. The funds objective is to provide current income. MFLX was launched on Sep 27, 2016 and is issued by First Trust.
